title: Subitem view on Parent Card
excerpt:

posts.author: sarahross1011 (Sarah R)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The ability to add subitem information onto the parent card the same way you can add your information widgets. Currently there is only one “subitem” widget and if you put it on your board it’s poorly presented. I would love to be able to choose either 1) a subitem section that has the same layout as an information widget where I can select whatever values I want to show in their own boxes) or 2) that the subitem fields are just available to add to any information widget (not it’s own “subitem” widget).

What are you trying to achieve

I use subitems to record contact information and it’s just very poorly presented on the parent card alongside all of the other information.
